title: 2026 Honda crf150r
description:
Honda CRF150RB – Low Hours, Stock, Absolute Rocket

Save yourself the dealer markup and hassle. New bikes might look cheaper on paper, but once you add freight, setup, and taxes, you’re close to $7K out the door. This one gives you the same performance with low hours, already dialed in and broken in, for significantly less and no extra costs.

Don’t let the size fool you, this bike is an absolute beast. The CRF150RB is known for being very, very fast for its class, and this one delivers exactly that. With around 30 hours, it’s still fresh and hits hard.

Completely stock, just the way you want it. No questionable mods, no guessing how it was set up. Pure, raw Honda performance.

This thing is quick, responsive, and has serious punch. It pulls hard, revs fast, and is an absolute blast to ride. Perfect for a rider looking to step up into something with real power.

Highlights:
• ~30 hours
• Stock and unmodified
• Very fast, high revving engine
• Strong, responsive power
• Well maintained and clean

If you know these bikes, you know they’re no joke. This one is ready to rip.

Message me if interested. Won't reply to lowball offers.

title: 2003 Hummer H2
description:
Showroom-Quality 2003 Hummer H2 -Luxury Series – 53,000 Original Miles
First Model Year / Iconic Competition Yellow / One Owner / Garage Kept
This 2003 has the spare tire inside. In 2005 they moved it to the outside, an ugly contraption the destroys the looks of the back and is a nightmare to deal with when you open the back or try to keep clean. You want this one!
Let us just get this out of the way…this is not your usual used Hummer H2.
This Hummer H2 has been babied double-waxed and insanely detailed three times a year for 23 years. 
If you are looking for a Hummer H2 you can just get into, drive home, and enjoy…without spending weekends and money getting it up to speed or chasing mystery rattles or leaks, this is your truck. Because there are none of those things to worry about. 
No mechanical issues ever.
No engine and drive train issues or leaks ever.
No cabin leaks ever.
Interior:
Dead mint. The leather is supple, clean, and free of discoloration, no sagging, or cracks. You will honestly wonder if anyone has ever sat in the driver’s seat. Carpet, dash, console, door panels, and original mats, are all immaculate.

Exterior:
The paint is flawless, like glass, front, back, sides, and roof. No stains, no dents, no chips, no fading.

The black plastic trim…especially the rear bumper cover that usually turns a chalky gray in two years…is still deep black and like new. No sunburn. No neglect. 

These trucks are known for faded trim… this one did not get the memo. (see pictures).

All weather stripping (doors, hood, rear hatch) treated, supple, clean, free of debris, not stretched or dried. It still seals like it did in 2003.

Completely stock, No modifications except…
*Upgraded 2006 Hummer H2 mirrors (much nicer than the 2003 Dumbo Mirrors)

*Replaced air suspension bags with top-of-the-line Strutmaster coil springs (not the weak GM Hummer coil springs). 
The Strutmaster coil springs are heavy duty and custom made to H2 specs keeping the ride level high, tight, and exactly where it should be. 
The air compressor works fine, and you could put new air suspension bags in if you wanted to. I found them to be finicky and the Strutmasters coil springs ride better.
New Things
New Tires BFGoodrich Hummer Tires All-Terrain T/A KO2 / 3000 miles ago
New Battery / 6 months ago
All new Monroe shocks top of the line / 2500 miles ago
All new NiCopp (Nickel-Copper) lifetime brake lines / 6000 miles ago
All new fuel pump 6000 miles ago
Oil and filter / 2000 miles ago
Fluids changed / 3000 miles ago transmission, transfer case, and differential.
Spark plugs and wires changed / 6000 miles ago
